scripts.dev: bun run dev:server && bun run dev:web
scripts.build:all: bun run build:desktop && bun run build:android && bun run build:server
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck:shared && bun run typecheck:server && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.check:rust: cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path crates/vcam-driver/Cargo.toml
scripts.verify:release: bun run install:all && bun run typecheck:all && bun run check:rust
scripts.deploy:all: bun run deploy:web && bun run deploy:server
scripts.install:rust: cargo fetch --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml && cargo fetch --manifest-path crates/vcam-driver/Cargo.toml
scripts.install:all: bun run install:root && bun run install:server && bun run install:web && bun run install:rust && bun run install:android && bun run install:docker
